source.fixture_policy: deterministic copied fixture; no raw user inputs, provider secrets, build outputs, logs, or local provider config

workspace_schema.local_first_privacy_boundary: Workbench may display aliases and relative workspace areas only; fixtures never include real user paths.

templates.title: 产品经理知识库模板
templates.use_case: Product requirements, roadmap, decisions, and release evidence
evaluation_questions: Can the package answer with cited evidence?
Does no-answer SOP trigger when evidence is missing?
Are stale or conflicting documents flagged?

templates.title: 图书/出版社知识库模板
templates.use_case: Books, editorial metadata, chapters, permissions, and publisher operations
evaluation_questions: Can the package answer with cited evidence?
Does no-answer SOP trigger when evidence is missing?
Are stale or conflicting documents flagged?

templates.title: 企业制度知识库模板
templates.use_case: Enterprise policy, SOP, compliance, and employee guidance
evaluation_questions: Can the package answer with cited evidence?
Does no-answer SOP trigger when evidence is missing?
Are stale or conflicting documents flagged?

templates.title: 教育伴学模板
templates.use_case: Course material, practice questions, feedback, and learning companion flows
evaluation_questions: Can the package answer with cited evidence?
Does no-answer SOP trigger when evidence is missing?
Are stale or conflicting documents flagged?

templates.title: 导购/运营 Agent 模板
templates.use_case: Product operations, shopping guidance, promotion, and service Agent use cases
evaluation_questions: Can the package answer with cited evidence?
Does no-answer SOP trigger when evidence is missing?
Are stale or conflicting documents flagged?

templates.title: 软件说明书 / 操作 Skill 模板
templates.use_case: Software manuals, operation steps, troubleshooting, and reusable Skill outputs
evaluation_questions: Can the package answer with cited evidence?
Does no-answer SOP trigger when evidence is missing?
Are stale or conflicting documents flagged?
